name: Rangbaazi Dilon Ki
overview: Shivangi saves her sister from a dowry-driven marriage only to be forced into marrying Ranbir, a man bound by family pressure and debt. Rejected by the Pandey’s, she finds strength in truth and compassion. As she slowly steadies the troubled home, Shivangi begins to see Ranbir’s true nature and love quietly takes root between them.
